title: Fuzzer: Segfault on genvar out of scope

features.name: genvar reference outside generate block scope
features.description: Code should include a genvar declared inside a generate block that is referenced outside that generate block's scope
features.snippet:
module t;
  generate
    for (genvar j = 0; j < 1; j++) begin
    end
  endgenerate
  wire [7:0] x = j + 1;
endmodule

features.name: member method call on integer type
features.description: Code should include a member method call attempt on an integer-typed variable, like accessing .e(0) on an integer

extraction_summary.note: No code block in issue body; testcase file 7.sv referenced but not attached. Abstracted features from title and error message.
